auth.tagline: Your AI health coach, built for life in Saudi Arabia.
auth.disclaimer: By continuing you agree to our Privacy Policy. Your health data stays private.
auth.configMissing: Firebase is not configured yet. Add your config to app.json (expo.extra.firebase) to enable sign-in.

phone.label: Phone number
phone.note: Phone OTP is finalized during on-device setup (it needs a reCAPTCHA or native verifier). Use Apple or Google for now.

pdpl.title: Your data, your control
pdpl.body: Nabdh processes your health and activity data to power your dashboard and coaching. Under Saudi PDPL we ask for your explicit consent, and you can view, export, or delete your data anytime.

healthkit.title: Connect Apple Health
healthkit.body: Allow Nabdh to read steps, heart rate, resting heart rate, HRV, blood oxygen, sleep, and energy from Apple Health. This data stays on your device and in your private account.

ai.title: AI coaching
ai.body: Your coach uses an AI model. The default model runs inside the region. If you later add your own provider key (Claude, GPT, or Gemini), a minimized summary of your data is sent to that provider abroad. We ask separate consent before that ever happens.

onboarding.title: Welcome to Nabdh
onboarding.needPdpl: Please allow data processing to continue.

home.greeting: Good morning, here is your day at a glance
home.addSub: Pick the metrics that matter to you
home.coachToday: Kabsa sorted your protein. Walk after Asr while it's cooler, dinner under 500 kcal, lights out by 11:15.
home.disclaimer: This is not medical advice and is not a substitute for a doctor.

readiness.label: Readiness
readiness.caption: Recovery beats grind today.
readiness.noData: Connect a device to see your readiness

device.fitbitSetup: Add your Fitbit Client ID to app.json (expo.extra.fitbit.clientId) to enable this.
device.googleSetup: Add your Google Health client ID + backend URL to app.json (expo.extra.googleHealth) to enable this.
